name: Magnesium Threonate
summary: Human evidence for magnesium exists broadly, but L-threonate-specific cognitive or sleep claims lack strong verified RCT support.
description: Magnesium threonate provides supplemental magnesium; magnesium-dependent enzymes and NMDA/GABA-linked modulation can support neurocognitive stress pathways, with limited threonate-specific RCT evidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
